calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2024 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Hearing (Motions)
Off Calendar Jul-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Samuel K. Feng; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings Not Reported.

Plaintiff Diaspora Inc. is represented by Ron Chow, Esq.
Defendant Boss Dog Games LLC not appearing.
Defendant Hamza Naqvi not appearing.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Diaspora Inc., and against Defendant Boss Dog Games LLC and Hamza Naqvi, as follows:

1. Damages: $51,897.44
2. Prejudgment Interest: $6,042.85
3. Costs: $564.00
4. Attorney fees: $800.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $59,304.29

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
